data.title: Hyperliquid (HYPE) is up 21% in August, but can it sustain the rally?
data.description:
Hyperliquid hits $3B daily spot volume, $87M monthly revenue. Hyperliquid now controls nearly 80% of the decentralised perpetuals market. However, risks like validator centralisation and volume dependence still persist. Hyperliquid’s native token HYPE has climbed 21
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/hyperliquid-hype-is-up-21-in-august-but-can-it-sustain-the-rally/

data.title: BREAKING: Banks are getting disrupted and they want to block stablecoins!
data.description:
U. S. banks are sounding the alarm that stablecoins may pull trillions from deposits, raising borrowing costs and shaking traditional lending.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/banks-warn-stablecoins-could-trigger-massive-deposit-flight

data.title: Safety Shot, Inc. Secures $30 Million in Strategic Funding
data.description: According to Foresight News, Safety Shot, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHOT) has announced the successful pricing of a $30 million financing round. The funding is led by a consortium of strategic investors, including FalconX. The transaction involves a registered direct offering of approximately $5 million in cash and a simultaneous private placement of $25 million paid in BONK tokens by founding members of BONK. All shares are priced at $0.46 each. The registered direct offering and the concurrent private placement are expected to close around August 27, 2025, subject to customary closing conditions.

data.title: Powell Unlikely to Regain Favor with Trump, Says White House Economic Advisor
data.description:

data.title: ETHZilla Corporation Approves $250 Million Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: According to BlockBeats, ETHZilla Corporation, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker ETHZ, has announced the approval of a stock buyback program with a maximum value of $250 million. This initiative is effective immediately. Additionally, the company disclosed its current holdings of 102,237 ETH, acquired at an average price of $3,948.72 per ETH, now valued at approximately $489 million. Besides its Ethereum holdings, ETHZilla also possesses around $215 million in cash equivalents.

data.title: White House Economic Advisor Considers Rate Cut Appropriate
data.description: According to PANews, White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett has stated that it is appropriate to consider a rate cut by the Federal Reserve. Additionally, Hassett mentioned that it may take several months before U.S. President Donald Trump makes a decision on the selection of the Federal Reserve Chair.

data.title: SUI and Jupiter (JUP) lead $620M token unlocks this week
data.description:
SUI and Jupiter lead a massive $620 million token unlock wave scheduled to go into circulation in the week between August 25 and September 1. SUI unlocks 44 million tokens worth $159. 26 million. In addition, JUP releases 53. 47 million tokens valued at $26. 96 million. Major linear unlocks include SOL, WLD, TIA, DOGE, and TAO during […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sui-jup-lead-token-unlocks-this-week/

data.title: Strategy adds 3,081 bitcoin for $357 million, bringing total holdings to 632,457 BTC

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/368086/strategy-buys-more-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Will $620M in Token Unlocks Stall the Crypto Market Rally?
data.description:
Key Insights: The market rally had reignited only days ago, led by Solana’s clean breakout. Now, a heavy schedule of token unlocks is arriving, with over $620 million set to hit the market between August 25 and September 1. The timing is critical: fresh supply is landing just as momentum has been building
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/25/will-620m-in-token-unlocks-stall-the-crypto-market-rally/

data.title: Japan’s finance minister endorses crypto as portfolio diversifier
data.description:
Japan’s Finance Minister Katsunobu Kato said crypto deserves a spot in portfolios, while pledging to build a sound trading environment for the sector.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/japanese-regulator-halves-taxes-on-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
